preamble: Palatalization of the velar nasal [ŋ] can lead to the formation of a voiced postalveolar affricate [dʒ].

examples.note: Shift of a velar nasal to a palatal affricate in front-vowel environments.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
